description.overview: An ancient breed developed for Chinese royalty, the Pekingese maintains their dignified, independent nature. They're devoted to their owners but can be aloof with strangers.
description.temperament: Known for being affectionate, loyal, regal.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their long, thick double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: An ancient breed developed for Chinese royalty, the Pekingese maintains their dignified, independent nature. They're devoted to their owners but can be aloof with strangers.
